The chatbot effectively utilizes user-provided trusted sources, ensuring the use of accurate and up-to-date information to generate responses. •It demonstrates a higher level of precision when compared to existing LLMs such as Bard and ChatGPT. •Article Filter & Summarizer- https://github.com/adityaghai07/Article-Filter-Summerizer Feb 2024 • Developed an article searcher and summarizer leveraging The General News Dataset from Kaggle. •Utilized collaborative filtering techniques including tokenization, stop-word removal, stemming, and TF-IDF vectorization for retrieving relevant articles. •Employed Hugging Face’s pipelines with the Facebook BART model for summarization.
